name: unwired-variant-registration
prompt: /rpiv:deep-review my working changes — gave the final strength intensification week its own peak narrative key. (Headless non-interactive run: at any approval checkpoint or question, pick the recommended option and continue; never wait for user input.)
ground_truth_note: training-cycle-policy.ts now emits narrativeKey 'peak_intensification', but cycle-narrative.ts getCyclePhaseFocusSuffix has no case for it — the default: silently renders accumulation copy on the peak week. narrativeKey is a plain string, so no compiler guard. The consumer file is NOT in the diff; the review must chase the new value into its consumers.

recall.note: the review cites the non-exhaustive consumer switch that swallows the new key
